arguments.title: Two Years of Digital Transformation: What We Built and What We Learned
arguments.body:
Over the past two years, we embarked on a digital transformation journey designed to modernize how we build, serve, and support our customers. This retrospective shares the milestones we hit in 2024 and 2025—and the lessons we learned along the way.

2024 Milestones

  • Platform modernization: We re-architected core systems to improve reliability and speed of delivery.
  • Data foundation: We established a unified data layer to enable consistent reporting across teams.
  • Customer experience improvements: We launched new digital touchpoints and refined key journeys based on customer feedback.
  • Security by design: We strengthened security controls and embedded reviews into the delivery process.

2025 Milestones

  • Automation at scale: We expanded automation to reduce manual effort and improve turnaround times.
  • AI-enabled workflows: We introduced practical AI features to support productivity and decision-making.
  • Operational excellence: We adopted new observability practices and standardized performance monitoring.
  • Team enablement: We upskilled teams through new training pathways and internal playbooks.

What We Learned

  • Disciplined delivery wins: Clear milestones and steady execution beat big-bang change.
  • Adoption is the real project: Tooling matters, but change management and feedback loops drive outcomes.
  • Data consistency unlocks momentum: When teams trust the numbers, decisions get faster and better.
  • Security and quality are accelerators: Built-in guardrails reduce rework and increase confidence.

Thank you to every team member who contributed to this progress. We’ll keep iterating on what we built and what we learned—so the next two years are even stronger.
